69ebb4d1ec937ad314320781.content: BHUJBAL MET% Institute of Technology B. Tech. KNOWLEDGE CITY Dear Students, Aliliated to Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar fechnological tinversty, Lonere Department of Computer Science And Design This is to inform you that the End Semester Practical/Oral Examinations are scheduled from 22nd November 2025 to 27th November 2025. Please note the following important instructions: Students must be present 10 minutes before the exam time. NOTICE " Students must be in proper uniform and must carry their ID card. " Students must bring their duly signed practical files, journals, and any other required documents. Mobile phones, smart watches, or any electronic gadgets are strictly prohibited during the examination. Date: 20-|1-2025 " Students must check their batch-wise timetable carefully and report to the respective laboratories on time.Any form of misconduct, unfair means, or malpractice will lead to strict disciplinary action. Gsonow ane " Students are advised to ensure that all practical files are completed, neat, and verified by the respective subject faculty before the exam. Exam Coordinator " For any queries or clarifications, students may contact the Departmental Prof.G.V.Sonawane Departmental Exam Coordinators Prof. M.B.Sonje CEO Dr.R.S.Narkhede Principal

69ebb4d8ec937ad314320786.content: Prof. Rajendra Narkhede <principal_iot@bkc.met.edu> Student Registration (Kindly forward to the students) : "PCCOE Job Fair - 2026" for Jobs/Apprenticeships & Internships for BE / BTech, Diploma, BSc, BCS, BCA, BA, BCom, BBA, BPharm, MBA, ITI and other course students from 2026 batch (Current final year), 2027 Batch (Pre Final year) & Already Passed Out in June /July 2025/ 2024/2023/2022/2021 batch on Saturday, 18/04/2026 at Pimpri Chinchwad college of Engineering (PCCOE), Nigdi Pune at 9:00 am II Event Organized in association with Board of Apprenticeship Training (BOAT), Maharashtra Association of TPOs (MaTPO) & All India TPO Association (AITPOA) 1 message Shitalkumar Rawandale <srawandale@gmail.com> Tue, Apr 7, 2026 at 6:34 PM To: Shitalkumar Rawandale <srawandale@gmail.com> Bcc: impMails8@googlegroups.com Dear Student, Greetings from Board of Apprenticeship Training (BOAT), WR, Mumbai-Autonomous body of Ministry of HRD, Govt. of India, CENTRAL PLACEMENT CELL of PCCOE, PCCOE&R, NMIET & NCER, Pune, Maharashtra Association of TPOs (MaTPO) & All India TPO Association (AITPOA) !! It gives us a pleasure to inform that Board of Apprenticeship Training (BOAT), WR, Mumbai and PCCOE are organizing "PCCOE Job Fair - 2026" in association with MaTPO & AITPOA for Jobs, Internships & one Year Apprenticeship for BE / BTech, Diploma BSc, BCS, BCA, BA, BCom, BBA, BPharm, MBA, ITI and other course students on Saturday, 18/04/2026 at Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering (PCCOE), Nigdi, Pune at 9:00 am. Around 45-50 companies are expected to participate in the Job Fair. The list of a few companies that have already confirmed their participation in "PCCOE Job Fair - 2026" on Saturday, 18/04/2026 at PCCOE, Pune can be viewed in the following link : https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1hLLbF0H6cjtcGDYR40Be3hq24JC7dUFdLg9WEul4w48/edit? usp=sharing Many other companies are supposed to confirm their participation in the coming week (around 100 companies are expected to participate).

69ebb4e6ec937ad314320790.content: ✅ Updated Feature List (Assignments Removed) 1. Classroom & User Management Classes / Sections Create and manage multiple classes or groups. Class dashboard showing announcements, files, polls, and members. Join class using class codes or invitations. User Roles Admin — full system control. Teacher — manages classes and communicates with students. Student — limited, secure access. Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) Students have restricted permissions. Teachers control only their classes. Admin has global control. 2. File & Document Management Upload & View Files Upload documents, images, PDFs, Word files, PPT, etc. In-app file preview (PDF viewer, image viewer). File Recovery System Soft-delete system so deleted files can be restored anytime. Trash system for recovery. Admin can override recovery permissions. File Versioning Keeps older versions of files for traceability. Class File Organization Each class has its own file library. Files can be tagged and categorized. 3. Smart Search & Auto Categorization Deep Content Search Search by: File name File content Text inside PDFs Text inside Word files Text inside images (OCR) Semantic Smart Search AI understands meaning of queries. Example: Searching “exam timetable” shows timetable-related files even with different names. Auto Categorization Automatically tags files: Timetables Notices Study material Exam schedules Images General files Search Filters Filter by class Filter by file type Filter by tags or category Filter by date uploaded 4. Messaging & Communication Teacher → Student Messaging Teachers send messages to individual students or entire class. Students can reply if enabled. Announcements Teachers post class-wide announcements (like Google Classroom Stream). Polls Teachers create polls/surveys. Students vote. Results shown to teacher (and optionally to students). Notifications New messages New polls Files uploaded File recovery events (restored/deleted) 5. Admin Features Admin Panel Manage all users. Create/del
